label: About
title: About Billiard Aircraft Surface Rupture
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 86 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @archivepilled: Nicolò Pucci di Benisichi, 'Biliardo con aereo' (2026) and @jonaasw1: cool internet things pt. 11 - retro console games - type out classic books -..., plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Billiard Aircraft Surface Rupture: Painted billiard-aircraft surface rupture, product-photo rupture with side-lit object slab grammar. A saturated green body-smear slices left-to-right across the upper half, cropped at both edges; a teal felt trapezoid anchors the lower field with warm varnished rails. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against long rubbed green aircraft skin, teal billiard-felt trapezoid, and bright fin-and-glare aperture.

typography.body_family: 'DFE Newsreader', Iowan Old Style, Georgia, serif
typography.rationale: Fraunces gives the title an organic, seed-label quality; Newsreader keeps the explanation calm and readable.
